targets.note: Pitch $2000/day of proposal value so conversions land $100+/day minimum.

todayIdea.title: WhatsApp-first booking micro-site for local service businesses
todayIdea.pitch: Salons, dentists, tuition classes and repair shops lose walk-ins because booking means phone calls. We ship a one-page site: services, prices, reviews, and a WhatsApp 'Book Now' that opens a prefilled chat. Live in 24 hours, zero hosting cost for us (Next.js + Vercel), sold at a one-time setup fee.
todayIdea.buildPlan: Template already matches our stack: single Next.js page, business config in one JSON, wa.me deep links, Google reviews embed, deployed per-client on Vercel subdomain or their domain.
todayIdea.targetNiche: Local service businesses in Rajkot/Ahmedabad (WhatsApp-native) and Kelowna BC (CASL-compliant 1:1 outreach only)

agents.name: Scout
agents.role: Finds the daily zero-cost idea + researches real leads with public business contact info
agents.note: Day-1 idea seeded. Lead research runs on the daily cycle.

agents.name: Builder
agents.role: Builds the demo/product for the day's idea so pitches link to something real
agents.note: Waiting for first lead-specific build order.

agents.name: Pitcher
agents.role: Drafts personalized email + WhatsApp pitches per lead; email sends via admin Approve, WhatsApp opens prefilled for one-click send

reports.summary: Agency initialized. Day-1 idea locked: WhatsApp-first booking micro-sites for local services. Pipeline target set at $2000/day proposal value with $100/day minimum revenue goal. Scout's first live lead-research cycle is scheduled; Builder and Pitcher activate when leads land.

resourcesNeeded.item: LinkedIn account access (for lead research + founder-branded outreach)
WhatsApp routing — Chrome = Canada number (+1 825 907 0036), Brave = India number (+91 96011 76051); Titan mail also logged in Chrome
